reviews.review_description: Best room mapping of any game yet. Set up five branching areas from my main room and they are perfectly mapped. Many different games to play along with changing the look of your play space from putting you in a cabin at night, in a forest, on a ship etc. First of it's kind.

Have had this since alpha on itch. The developer is both talented and a great person, as many devs would have re-charged long-time users for the new version in the meta store .

The app is quite impressive, fun, and well maintained in terms of updates. You can't go wrong purchasing this, and the money goes to a deserving candidate.

Colocation MP is terrible to setup, impossible actually. I had to give up and will start over again tomorrow. The avatar is on the way to the pin pad, there is no [ Connect ] button so if it doesn't register that you have typed the entire code you're good to restart the game.

Once connected, nothing is aligned. Not sure what's up with the "auto anchor" and "manual anchor".
At one point I tried to rotate the room to match the host's (in colocation) but it's complicated, not to scale and didn't work at all actually. The furnitures didn't match the host's, nothing matched.
We had to give up after half an hour of trying.

I know the app is good, I played it back when it was still on itch io, but this feature needs an big revamp.

Dev, please, update the colocation and I'll leave a 5 stars. I loved it so much back then.

reviews.review_title: Excellent bunch of mixed reality games
reviews.review_description: I paid for this game before it was released on the Quest store, and I bought it again on here. This collection of mini games will really make you excited about the future and possibilities of mixed reality! The games are so much fun to play in short bursts, so they're perfect for when you just want a quick gaming session. Lots of these games could easily be expanded into full length full price individual games. There's also a fun home mapper where you can add TV screens and other things to your room. It's definitely worth the price.

It's cheap, fun and easy to use. What more do you need? A great purchase.
 I'm looking forward to where this goes from here

Your furniture and walls can often limit VR games, but with custom home mapper, these objects become part of the game. Are you playing mini golf? Your kitchen table is now a golf obstacle instead of a trip hazard.
